headline: Is LyondellBasell (LYB) Pricing Reflect Its Value After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: If you are wondering whether LyondellBasell Industries' current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what you might be getting for the price you pay. The stock recently closed at US$57.88, with returns of 2.2% over the past week, 18.1% over the past month, and 30.4% year to date, while the 1 year and 3 year returns sit at a 12.3% decline and 25.8% decline respectively, and the 5 year return at a 25.0% decline. headline: LyondellBasell Weighs Oil Gas Spread Benefits Against Losses And Dividend Cut
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) is positioned to potentially benefit from wider spreads between oil and natural gas following Iran related tensions affecting crude prices. The shift in commodity pricing is drawing attention to the company’s feedstock mix and how it might affect margins in its core petrochemicals and plastics operations. LyondellBasell Industries, a major producer of petrochemicals, plastics, and refining products, sits at the intersection of energy and manufacturing...
